Version
  • API Reference
  • Chat Client
  • Chat Client

Chat Client

The chat client abstraction provides a uniform interface to LLM providers. AbstractChatClient defines the protocol; concrete implementations (e.g., OpenAIChatClient, AnthropicChatClient) handle provider-specific details. All clients support both synchronous and streaming response modes.

Abstract Types

AgentFramework.AbstractChatClient — Type

Base type for all chat client implementations.

Options and Responses

AgentFramework.ChatOptions — Type
ChatOptions

Options for a chat client request.

Fields

  • model::Union{Nothing, String}: Model identifier override.
  • temperature::Union{Nothing, Float64}: Sampling temperature.
  • top_p::Union{Nothing, Float64}: Nucleus sampling parameter.
  • max_tokens::Union{Nothing, Int}: Maximum tokens in response.
  • stop::Union{Nothing, Vector{String}}: Stop sequences.
  • tools::Vector{FunctionTool}: Tools available for this request.
  • tool_choice::Union{Nothing, String}: Tool selection mode ("auto", "none", "required", or function name).
  • response_format::Union{Nothing, Dict{String, Any}}: Structured output format.
  • additional::Dict{String, Any}: Provider-specific options.
AgentFramework.ChatResponse — Type
ChatResponse

Complete response from a chat client.

Fields

  • messages::Vector{Message}: Response messages.
  • response_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Response identifier.
  • conversation_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Conversation state identifier.
  • model_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Model used.
  • finish_reason::Union{Nothing, FinishReason}: Completion reason.
  • usage_details::Union{Nothing, UsageDetails}: Token usage.
AgentFramework.ChatResponseUpdate — Type
ChatResponseUpdate

A streaming update from a chat client.

Fields

  • role::Union{Nothing, Symbol}: Message role (usually set on first update).
  • contents::Vector{Content}: Content items in this update.
  • finish_reason::Union{Nothing, FinishReason}: Set on the final update.
  • model_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Model that produced this update.
  • usage_details::Union{Nothing, UsageDetails}: Token usage (usually on final update).
  • response_id::Union{Nothing, String}: Response identifier.

Finish Reasons

AgentFramework.FinishReason — Type
FinishReason

Reason a chat response completed.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.STOP. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.LENGTH. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.TOOL_CALLS. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.CONTENT_FILTER. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.FINISH_ERROR. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Streaming

AgentFramework.ResponseStream — Type
ResponseStream{T}

Wrapper around a Channel{T} that provides async iteration for streaming responses.

Usage

stream = run_agent_streaming(agent, "Hello")
for update in stream
    print(get_text(update))
end
response = get_final_response(stream)
AgentFramework.StreamingToolAccumulator — Type
StreamingToolAccumulator

Accumulates partial tool call data across streaming chunks. Tool calls arrive in pieces: first the function name, then argument fragments.

Request Functions

AgentFramework.get_response — Function
get_response(client::AbstractChatClient, messages, options) -> ChatResponse

Send messages to the LLM and get a complete response. Must be implemented by concrete chat client types.

AgentFramework.get_response_streaming — Function
get_response_streaming(client::AbstractChatClient, messages, options) -> Channel{ChatResponseUpdate}

Send messages to the LLM and get a streaming response channel. Must be implemented by concrete chat client types.

Utilities

AgentFramework.merge_chat_options — Function
merge_chat_options(base, override) -> ChatOptions

Merge two ChatOptions, with override values taking precedence.

Missing docstring.

Missing docstring for AgentFramework.parse_finish_reason. Check Documenter's build log for details.

Streaming Tool Accumulation

AgentFramework.accumulate_tool_call! — Function

Process a streaming chunk that may contain partial tool call data.

AgentFramework.get_accumulated_tool_calls — Function

Get all completed tool calls as Content items.

AgentFramework.reset_accumulator! — Function

Reset the accumulator.

AgentFramework.has_tool_calls — Function

Check if there are any accumulated tool calls.
